_description: European Defence Tech Knowledge Graph — Companies (master records)
_instructions: This file contains curated, validated company records.
NOTHING is written here directly by scraping agents.
Records are either manually bootstrapped or promoted by the confirmation agent.
BEFORE ADDING A NEW RECORD: search for canonical_domain and all aliases.
If either exists in another record, update that record — do not create a new one.
Fields that are computed live from events (total_raised, funding_stage) are NOT stored here.
Numeric fields with uncertainty carry _min, _max, _best suffix and a confidence_score.

_deduplication_rules.primary_anchor: canonical_domain — globally unique, check this first
_deduplication_rules.secondary_anchor: aliases — check all name variants before creating a new record
_deduplication_rules.agent_instruction: Before inserting a new company object, confirm that neither its canonical_domain nor any of its known names appear in any existing record in this file.

_computed_live_from_events: total_raised_eur — sum of all confirmed fundraise events
funding_stage — derived from most recent fundraise event
headcount_exact — derived from most recent key_hire / headcount_update events
last_valuation — derived from most recent fundraise or valuation_update event

classification.dual_use_note: Explicitly defence-only — company has publicly stated it will not serve authoritarian governments

companies.description_short: AI software and autonomous systems for defence, focusing on sensor fusion and battlefield decision support

provenance.confidence_rationale: Primary source is company website. Founded year, HQ, and vertical confirmed across multiple tier-1 outlets. Classification is agent-inferred.
